fields.name: atlasRangerServiceName
fields.label: Atlas Ranger service repo
fields.help: Ranger service-repository name backing Atlas authorization (when ACL = ranger).

fields.name: federationUser
fields.label: Federation / bot user
fields.help: Local Atlas account a federating service authenticates as.

fields.name: federationPassword
fields.label: Federation / bot password
fields.help: Password for the federation/bot user. For a managed context this is provisioned automatically.
